_comment: Rosie MCP server for Continue (VS Code / JetBrains). Continue reads MCP servers from ~/.continue/config.json under experimental.modelContextProtocolServers (each entry has a transport block). Replace /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/rosie with your local rosie checkout. Speaks the real MCP stdio JSON-RPC 2.0 transport (rev 2025-06-18): initialize -> tools/list -> tools/call. Doctrine v11 LOCKED 749/14/163 @ c7c0ba17 | Lambda = Conjecture 1 (NOT a theorem). 12 live tools route to the SZLHOLDINGS organ mesh; safety-critical tools require a 3-of-4 Byzantine quorum. Honest: results reflect the REAL organ response/error.
